original: You call [wulfe.name] to you side and command her to enter guard mode.

\n\n“Of course, "+(wulfe.isDom()?"[wulfe.pcname]":"[pc.master]")+",” she says with a slim smile. “"+(wulfe.isBimbo()?"I’ll, like, take super good care of you! Don’t you worry about a thing!":"I live to serve.")+"”
\n\nShe trots around you, rolling her shoulders and lowering her combat visor. Looks like she’s ready to go!
You put a hand on [wulfe.name]’s shoulder and tell her to stand down for now -- to go into passive mode.

\n\n“Are you sure, "+(wulfe.isDom()?"[wulfe.pcname]":"[pc.master]")+"?” she asks, trotting up and circling you. “"+(wulfe.isBimbo()?"I can’t, like, keep you safe and stuff if I’m in pa... pass... idle mode!":"My purpose is to protect you, after all.")+"”
\n\nYou tell her that you’re sure. Just follow along quietly until you reactivate her. She sighs and nods, falling into step behind you.
